name: Palworld
longDescription:
Palworld is an open-world survival crafting game where you collect, breed, and battle creatures called Pals. This ServApp deploys a dedicated multiplayer server using the community thijsvanloef/palworld-server-docker image.

Configure server name, player count, passwords, crossplay platforms, and data path at install time. UDP game and Steam query ports are published for clients; the REST API port is exposed for local administration and should not be forwarded publicly.
description: Dedicated Palworld multiplayer server with installer options for ports, players, passwords, and persistent world data.
